description: Fresh CS graduate with generic objective, basic skill set, two trivial projects, no internship experience, and no quantification
resumeText:
David Kim
david.kim123@gmail.com | Boston, MA

OBJECTIVE
I am seeking a software engineering position to utilize my computer science degree and improve my programming skills in a professional environment.

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science, Computer Science — Boston University
Graduated May 2024
Relevant Courses: Introduction to Programming, Data Structures, Computer Organization, Discrete Mathematics, Software Engineering Principles

SKILLS
Programming Languages: Java, Python, C++
Tools: Eclipse, PyCharm, Microsoft Word, Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint
Operating Systems: Windows, Linux (basic)

PROJECTS

Calculator App
- Made a basic calculator using Java
- Has addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division
- Used Swing for the graphical interface
- This was for my software engineering class

To-Do List CLI Tool
- Created a command-line to-do list program in Python
- Users can add and remove tasks from a text file
- Learned how to read and write files in Python

EDUCATION ACTIVITIES
- Attended lecture and lab sessions regularly
- Completed all course assignments
- Studied for and passed all exams

HOBBIES
- Playing video games
- Watching YouTube
- Learning to cook
